description: Orchestrate OSMO defect-image generation/augmentation/labeling for AOI datasets; renders the defect_spec.jsonl that anomaly-infer routes on.
rules: destructive: feeds OSMO workflows that submit remotely, train/finetune, and may deploy a local NIM
run preflights first: preflight_credentials.sh, preflight_pod_template.sh, then preflight_urls.sh <flow> <usecase> [variant] before every submit
image_edit_model is always nvidia/Qwen-Image-Edit-NVPCB-OVSL2SL (Day 0); never the generic qwen-image-edit
dig_url_root has NO silent default — elicit it before any submit / osmo data upload (~80 GB+ lands there)
regenerate a fresh name stamp per submit; never download assets locally to work around a failure
DEFECT_PAIRS is a JSON list of [material, defect] pairs; SPATIAL_DEPENDENCY is one of free / text / cad
usage: Set DEFECT_PAIRS (JSON [material,defect] pairs) and optional SPATIAL_DEPENDENCY. render_defect_spec writes defect_spec.jsonl under RECORD_STORE — the AMP/SDG taxonomy the OSMO anomaly-infer stage routes on. The vendored preflight_*.sh + pick_best_step.sh helpers gate and select checkpoints for the OSMO submits this skill governs.
limitation: All flows run on NVIDIA OSMO and require an OSMO credential (hf-token), a DIG-compliant POD_TEMPLATE (nvoptix mount + /dev/shm >= 16 GiB), GPUs, and (Day 0) a Qwen Image-Edit OVSL2SL endpoint. Per-defect spatial-dependency mixing is not supported by this fallback — ship a custom defect_spec.jsonl for that. The governed render step is local; submitting/training/deploying happen remotely on OSMO.
